common.title: Title
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

matrix.title: Narrative Matrix
matrix.noChapters: No chapters found. Create chapters to see the matrix.

plot.confirmDeletePoint: Are you sure you want to delete this plot point? This action cannot be undone.
plot.confirmDeleteLine: Are you sure you want to delete this plot line? This will also delete all its plot points. This action cannot be undone.

home.deckHeadline: Return to Your Stories, One Card at a Time
home.deckIntro: Use the wheel, arrow keys, or side controls to browse novels. Back cards glide to the front; click the front card to jump straight into writing.
home.deckHint: Interaction: wheel / ← → / click visible cards / Enter to open the current novel.
home.deckDescriptionFallback: "{{title}}" is ready for your next scene. Continue from the current chapter, or refine outline and world settings before you dive back in.
home.title: Title
home.author: Author
home.autoCover: Leave empty to auto-generate artistic cover.
home.enterToSaveHint: Press Enter to save. In the summary field, use Ctrl/Cmd + Enter.
home.deleteNovelConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. Chapters and related data under "{{title}}" will be removed.
home.searchAllHint: Type title, author, or summary keywords to quickly locate a book.
home.searchAllEscHint: Press ESC to exit the all-books page

editor.titleGenFailed: Title generation failed. Please try again.
editor.continueModalDesc: Choose target length, creativity, and ideas before generating.
editor.continueBlocked: Chapter 1 has no outline and too little text, so continue is blocked.
editor.continueBlockedHint: Do one of these first: add a minimal outline, or manually write at least 120 characters.
editor.continueUserIntentPlaceholder: For example: increase suspense, let the protagonist actively test the clue, end with a twist hook.
editor.continueUserIntentHint: Can be empty. Applies only to this generation and clears when modal closes.
editor.continueCurrentLocationPlaceholder: For example: World Map - Apartment Building
editor.continueCurrentLocationHint: Can be empty. Helps indicate where this scene happens for this run only.
editor.aiActivateHint: Press Space to enable AI, or press / for commands
editor.aiQuickInputPlaceholder: Tell AI what you want, or use /continue /title...
editor.aiQuickTitleNeedContent: Chapter content is empty, cannot generate title directly
editor.continueDraftReadyToast: Continuation draft is ready (no auto popup).
editor.continueDraftReadyDescription: To avoid interrupting writing, preview was not opened automatically.
editor.continueNoNewText: No new content detected. Try different settings.
editor.continueFailed: Continue failed. Check model settings and retry.
editor.promptOverridePlaceholder: You can adjust this prompt before generate. This change will not be saved.
editor.paramMode: Generation mode: new chapter or continuation
editor.paramContextCount: Number of previous chapters to reference

idea.jumpFailed: Unable to locate, original text may have changed

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.recordTip: Click button to record new shortcut. Esc to cancel.

ai.title: AI
ai.modelPresetHint: Selecting a preset model will automatically fill the input below
ai.imageModelPresetHint: Selecting an image model will automatically fill the input below
ai.maxTokensHint: Limits maximum output length (too small may cause truncation)

mcpCopy.title: External CLI Registration
mcpCopy.desc: Copy the registration config/command below to register Novel Editor MCP directly in Codex CLI or Claude Code.
mcpCopy.codexHint: Append it to Codex config file, then restart Codex.
mcpCopy.claudeLabel: Claude Code registration command (run in terminal)
mcpCopy.claudeHint: Run once to register this MCP server.
mcpCopy.jsonHint: Use this for clients that support mcpServers JSON configuration.
mcpCopy.pathMissing: MCP launcher file not found. Please restart the app or reinstall.
mcpCopy.loadFailed: Failed to load MCP setup config

ai.localOnlyDesc: API keys and tokens are stored only on this device. They are not written into the novel database and are excluded from backup and restore.
ai.presetDesc: Presets only fill recommended endpoints, models and default parameters. They never write your secret key automatically.

proxy.noHint: Bypass proxy for these hostnames or IPs. Use comma-separated list, e.g., localhost,127.0.0.1

creativity.label: Creativity Level
creativity.safeDesc: More stable and less likely to drift, good for strict continuation and structured generation.
creativity.balancedDesc: Balanced between stability and creativity. Recommended default.
creativity.creativeDesc: More imaginative but more likely to drift. Better for brainstorming.

summary.title: Chapter Summary Strategy

trigger.auto: Trigger: Automatic (not recommended with frequent autosave)

summary.recentRawCount: Recent chapters kept as raw text during continuation
summary.notice: Note: Local heuristic summaries can be inaccurate. AI summaries cost tokens. Prefer maintaining outline and story lines first.
summary.notice2: Recommendation: AI summaries should default to manual trigger. If you choose finalized trigger, the app will wait until the chapter stays unchanged long enough and reaches the minimum word count.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.exportDesc: Create a full backup of all novels, chapters, characters, and ideas.
backup.importDesc: Supports cross-device restoration. WARNING: This will wipe current data and restore state from backup. An auto-backup is created safely before restoring.
backup.enterPassword: This backup is encrypted. Enter password:
backup.passwordRequiredDesc: This backup is encrypted. Please enter the password to restore.
backup.autoDesc: Snapshots taken automatically before recent dangerous operations.
backup.confirmRestoreAuto: Are you sure to rollback to this snapshot? Current data will be lost.

map.title: Maps
map.deleteConfirm: Delete this map? All markers will be removed.
map.noBgHint: Click 'Upload Background' to add a map image
map.dragCharacter: Drag characters onto the map to place markers

aiWorkbench.title: AI Workbench
aiWorkbench.briefPlaceholder: Describe your brief, for example: one plot line, 3 characters, 2 key items, and 1 world map draft
aiWorkbench.autoModeHint: By default, the system infers what to generate from your natural-language brief. For example, "generate a background character" only generates characters.
aiWorkbench.autoModeHintShort: The system auto-detects what to generate from your brief.
aiWorkbench.manualModeHint: Override auto detection and force specific sections for this generation.
aiWorkbench.manualModeHintShort: Use manual mode only when you need to limit the scope.
aiWorkbench.needTargetSections: Select at least one section to generate
aiWorkbench.noSelectionYet: Nothing selected yet. After generation, edit and select items in the right draft dock.
aiWorkbench.selectedSummary: Selected: Plot Lines {{plotLines}} / Plot Points {{plotPoints}} / Characters {{characters}} / Items {{items}} / Skills {{skills}} / Maps {{maps}}
aiWorkbench.generated: Drafts generated. Edit and select items before saving.
aiWorkbench.generateFailed: Draft generation failed. Check model settings and retry.
aiWorkbench.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one item before saving
aiWorkbench.validationFailed: Validation failed. Fix issues before saving.
aiWorkbench.persistFailedAtomic: Save failed. No partial changes were kept; transaction rolled back.
aiWorkbench.persistException: Save failed unexpectedly. No partial changes were kept; transaction rolled back.
aiWorkbench.atomicRollbackHint: No partial changes were saved; this batch was rolled back.
aiWorkbench.workspaceOverviewEmpty: This is the AI workbench workspace. Describe the request first, generate drafts, then edit and save them from the right draft dock.
aiWorkbench.workspaceOverviewWithDraft: Drafts are ready. You can refine the brief further, or edit, filter, and save them from the right draft dock.
aiWorkbench.workflowStep1Desc: Use natural language, such as "generate a background character" or "add one plot line and two plot points."
aiWorkbench.workflowStep2Desc: Auto mode detects what to generate by default. Open advanced settings only when you need tighter control.
aiWorkbench.workflowStep3Title: Edit on the Right and Save
aiWorkbench.workflowStep3Desc: Detailed editing stays in the right draft dock so the left panel remains focused and compact.
aiWorkbench.workflowCompactHint: Describe the request, generate drafts, then finish detailed editing and selection in the right dock.
aiWorkbench.generatedOpenRightHint: Draft generated and opened in the right dock for editing and selection.
aiWorkbench.filteredInvalidCount: {{count}} invalid draft entries were filtered out (missing required name/title).
aiWorkbench.emptyGeneratedHint: No valid draft content was generated. Add more detail or adjust selected sections.
aiWorkbench.editInRightDockHint: Draft detail editing has moved to the right dock. Use the top Draft button to toggle.
aiWorkbench.editInRightDockHintCompact: Draft details are now on the right. Use the top Draft button to show or hide them.
